scripts.build: npm run build -w @dpv/license-crypto && npm run build -w admin-panel && npm run build -w dpv-app
scripts.build:admin: npm run build -w @dpv/license-crypto && npm run build -w admin-panel
scripts.build:dpv: npm run build -w @dpv/license-crypto && npm run build -w dpv-app
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w admin-panel && npm run lint -w dpv-app
